title: ROM actor evidence for Jova to Berkeley
assumptions: Actor row pointers in cv2r are file offsets into the iNES ROM, including the 16-byte header.
Live actor-list CPU pointers in the captures are switchable bank-1 addresses in the $8000-$BFFF CPU window.
Actor names are still source labels from the cv2r actor-id dictionary; the ROM proves ids and row bytes, not English names by itself.
Enemy data is treated as base HP by a cv2r patch clue; direct routine proof of HP loading and night strengthening is a next research target.

actors.name: shepherd
actors.dataMeaning: actor data byte; text/item behavior path still needs direct routine proof
actors.text:
first thing
to do in
this town is
buy a white
crystal.
actors.decodedText:
first thing
to do in
this town is
buy a white
crystal.
actors.textProof: text pointer from cv2r; byte content at pointer decodes with the in-game text map and round-trips to the same string

snippets.enemyHpPatchClue:
// enemy (actor) data is stored as x,y,id,hp so we offset the pointer by 3 bytes
pm.add([ enemy.data ], enemy.pointer + 3);
